text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Two days have passed since the tryout races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tomorrow, I'll have to prove myself to Symboli Rudolf. I'm walking
around, racking my brain for ideas, and then...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh. Hello again, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Wait! You're the trainer who was speaking to Rudolf in the cafeteria
the other day, right?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Haha! When a trainer has a meal with someone of Rudolf's caliber
right after the tryouts, word's bound to get out!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Heh... I guess we attracted more attention than either of us could
have expected.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
You and Rudolf seem close... Would you mind if I asked a favor of
you?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Could you stay by Rudolf's side today and take some candid shots of
her?
choice_data_list: You want me to take photos?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
My apologies for dragging you into this. They want to do an "up close
and personal" feature with me, you see.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The only problem is, when I'm surrounded by professional reporters, I
end up acting professional myself.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I was at my wit's end, wondering what to do—and that's when you
happened to arrive.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure Rudolf will be able to relax if she's around you! Please help
us out!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Wait, you mean it? You... really do go the extra mile.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: In that case, I look forward to our day together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so I take the camera from the reporter and prepare to spend the
day taking candid snaps of Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now then. According to the journalist, I should ignore the camera and
go about my daily routine.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There's a new student I'm concerned about. I have an idea to help her
better adjust to life here.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Shall we?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Ah. I've been looking for you, Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Well, hello, Rudolf! And hello to you too, trainer.♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: So, what brings you here? Anything I can help you with?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes, actually. I was hoping you could help me with a first-year named
Grass Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder! Yes, I know her. She's an absolute sweetie—and so
polite! What about her?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It might be because she's not accustomed to the academy's track yet,
but she's having a bit of trouble with her technique coming out of the
gate.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Is that so? Well, it does take a while to adjust, especially when you're in a brand-new environment.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I don't want her to fall before she's even had a chance to fly. Could
you perhaps give her some words of wisdom?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Sure, I can give her some pointers, but... why me, if you don't mind me
asking?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder... The explosive burst of energy she puts forth when
she runs reminds me somewhat of you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That's why I figured you'd be in the best position to help her.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: That makes sense. You really do look out for all of us, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm totally down, leave it to me! Do you know where Grass is?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I always appreciate the enthusiasm, Maruzensky. I can take you to her
now, if you like.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Symboli Rudolf leads the way to Grass Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no. She looks so down in the dumps. But I'm on it! I'll turn her
frown upside down!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I knew I could count on you. I leave this matter in your capable hands,
Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Having me there would make Grass Wonder nervous. That's the last
thing I want for her.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Personally, I think she'd be happy to know you're looking out for her.
Hehe, but I like this awkward side of you too.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I'm off.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That's that, then. I hope speaking with Maruzensky can alleviate
Grass Wonder's worries.
choice_data_list: You really know the student body.
You really know the student body.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, for Grass Wonder... I know she lived in the US for a while. She
has a gentle outward demeanor that belies an adamant will within.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
She runs as a late surger, using cool-headed observation skills to
keenly assess the field and seize victory with precision. I expect she'll
go on to do great things

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And it's not just her. Every student here enters the academy with their
own dreams and hopes. Every one of them has the potential to make
them come true.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I... wish to make them all happy. I can't help but feel it's my duty to
create a world where all of them can wear smiles.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Does this sound like the foolish dream of a sheltered girl? Perhaps
that's just what it is.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It goes without saying the road to achieving my goal is long, with no
end in sight, but...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Maruzensky. I... have been putting myself under a lot of pressure, haven't I?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's right. You're quite serious, and you always give everything one
hundo p!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But trying to please everyone all the time will wear you down. Why
don't we chillax and go for a drive sometime?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: That sounds wonderful! Hehe... It would be my honor! ♪

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Look at her smile.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I hope its warmth never fades... Of that, at least, I have no doubt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something about Symboli Rudolf's own warm smile tugs at my heart.
It's such a peaceful, contented expression.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Almost without thinking, I raise the camera, and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What a beautiful shot. As the shutter clicks, I also feel something
click into place within me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I think I finally have the answer to Symboli Rudolf's question.
